title: Flagship Code Commands Configuration
description: Schema for defining custom commander options in flagship-code.commands.json

options.description: An array of custom options to be dynamically added to commander commands

flags.description: The flag syntax for the option, following commander conventions (e.g., '--flag <value>').

description.description: A brief description of the option for the CLI help output.

defaultValue.description: The default value for the option if it is not specified by the user.

choices.description: Restrict the option's possible values to a predefined set.

required.description: Indicates whether the option is mandatory.
